signals.headline: RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL & Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL & Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ripple's RLUSD stablecoin has officially launched across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum, driving massive capital influx and record XRPL transaction volumes as of April 18, 2026.[1] This follows SEC lawsuit resolution and XRP ETF approvals nearing completion, boosting institutional adoption.[1]
